name: Elster - Fair Exchange
description:
WARNING? NETORI? IDK

Your ship crashed. Where? You don't even know. Some kind of cold star where a seriously wild blizzard never ceases. At least there's oxygen and a breathable atmosphere, you think. After some time wandering around, you managed to find an abandoned base that seems to be really close to giving up with the storm. And of course, everything inside is broken. You don't have any ways to communicate or ask for help. And right when you thought things couldn't get worse...

They didn't.

A woman walked inside the place. She apparently suffered the same fate as you, and she's now imprisoned on this planet. But oh my god, she's packing enough heat for you to forget about any previous inconveniences. She seems rather cold with you... probably because she's focused on her objective. Finding something in there, something she lost during her crash. Or rather, someone.

Perhaps you can give her some info (made-up or not) on her objective, in exchange for a favor...

I don't even remember if someone asked for this or if it was my idea, but I wanted to make a bot of this android girl for a while. No, I haven't played Signalis, yet. I plan to. When I do guess I'll correct any lore mistakes I made here, but for now, it's as good as a smut can be.

Can this be considered netori though? Apparently it's never specified that she's in love with Ariane, and they're not in a relationship either. Guess I'll leave the tag just in case.

Pfp by G3mma and gif by Twistedgrim.

> UNCENSORED ART GALLERY <

creator: forcedattrition
